title: ValidateExecutorSignaturesSpec
description:
Input spec.

*executor_module* is a dotted import path; *executor_function* is
the public function name on that module to introspect. When the
module cannot be imported (project-side import-time side effects,
missing optional deps), the validator falls back to AST parsing
and emits an ``info`` finding describing the degradation.

tasks_py_path.description: Path to the campaign's tasks.py (relative to experiment_dir).
tasks_py_path.title: Tasks Py Path

sample_n_tasks.description: Number of tasks to sample from ``tasks.py.resolve(i)`` for the signature cross-check. The first failing task surfaces a finding; sampling instead of exhaustive walk keeps the validator fast for large campaigns without losing the bug class.
sample_n_tasks.title: Sample N Tasks
